review_title: I'll miss you Marky!
description: Overall, my experience with Marky is ALL 5 STARS! I'm telling you it was like having a content creator on my side doing all the content posts which allowed me more time to focus on clients and prospects.
author: Kimberly S.
pros: Ai created content matching my brand voice and values Marky was fast and I could generate content for weeks, it saved me so much time. I was spending hours everyday creating my content before using Marky. I don't know how I will generate the quality content and images that Marky was able to do for me.
cons: Not really anything. Its a super helpful app. I don't like that I can afford it right now but when I can, I will sign up again.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Never worry about designing content and images to go viral on social media
description: I have bought a lot of software for writing promotional content on social networks. Only Marky makes me most satisfied and I use it every day. Beautiful interface, easy to use, works well on phones, just need a smartphone and in less than 5 minutes you will have the content of all 30 articles for many social networks.
author: Nguyen Van A.
pros: Marky helps me a lot in composing and designing content and images for social media promotion. I have been using Marky for more than 3 months now, I use it every day because it is so interesting, I really love its features. The software is getting better and easier to use, especially the interface on the phone. There are still some flaws and small errors but I know the software is still in the strong development stage so this is normal. Importantly, the support team is very attentive and responds very quickly, the error correction speed is only 2-3 days. In addition, the software has also helped me save a lot of money instead of hiring content writers and banner designers. Use Marky for your business and you will definitely love it.
cons: For me, Marky has just 2 main tasks: writing attractive content and designing beautiful images, and it has met them. However, since the software is in the development stage, you will see new errors and dissatisfaction appear regularly. However, after reporting and asking for help to fix the errors, it takes about 2-3 days for the errors to be fixed.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good for ideas, but lacks originality and finesse
description: I think Marky is create to help produce basic content for your social media but it lacks originality. You definitely need to edit a lot if you want that content to be of actual value for your audience. If you want more of your own personality in your posts, I don't recommend leaning too hard on Marky.
author: Valerie B.
pros: The AI tech behind Marky is exciting - it helps to generate ideas on content for your business by analyzing data around your mission, your offerings, and other aspects of your business.
cons: The type of content produced is limited and repetitive. I feel like it sometimes misses the mark when it comes to analyzing the data and generates content based off of trendy language rather than using the user's own voice.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: My bset helper in Social media
description: I love the updates and the support!! It helps me a lot - especially in the seasons i want to have time for other stuff in life like: LIFE itself ;-)
author: Marta A.
pros: I like the speed and the overall quality of posts. Especially i discovered how to tweak it even better: feed with my pictures and even videos - and let write the caprions and long form posts- you can direct the AI to write your stuff - in writing first sentences and letting write longer- this is very helpfull. OK its not direct from the heart stories but good content - i would need ages for. so i love the tool!!
cons: ok bevore i used my pictures it gives me verid pictures: like very big fat people, or some strange ( not ffunny for my age) "posts" - and some posts just come again and again - the system dont learn until now what i dont like ;-) but with my own pictures it looks much more beeter and cog´hrernt. and if you wouldnt post anything... than just use this content.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I have been a Marky Raving Fan since purchased !
description: I needed tech help - they were able to do it without really much I had to do .
author: Tammy A.
pros: Its the only platform I know that can generate and post content on its own~ simply but inputting info nd they are always expanding their platform !
cons: nothing really I don't like as they always adjust pictures, messages and posts if I don't like-
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Highly recommend Marky software
description: The customer service is fast, friendly and courteous. they answer the chat right away and solve whatever issues I've had quickly.
author: George B.
pros: The software makes social media posting a total breeze and their customer service is unmatched.
cons: Nothing at all. What's there not to like?
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: You won't write a month's worth of GREAT content in 5 minutes. Still worth it.
description: It's been one day. I've generated posts for the rest of the month in about 3h, including uploading hundreds of images. Next month, I'll be able to generate a month's worth of posts for Facebook, The Tweet Machine, Google Business, and Pinterest in, say, an hour. Vice 4h or so with Loomly. I'll probably generate several months at a time. I was paying 250 a month for this service through a provider, and the posts weren't in my voice. Here, I can rewrite their meh prompts into my voice quickly and hit schedule.
author: Julie M.
pros: Quick "seeds" for posts. The writing is obviously ai generated (very poor), and everything needs to be rewritten. This is fine because the main issue with content generation isn't the wording. It's coming up with bunches of topics. The more you give it, the better it does. I uploaded hundreds of our images and turned off the image library feature.
cons: The layouts aren't great for my brand. I only used "simple image" because that's all I need as our brand showcases a product that needs great photos and nothing more.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Pro Marketer's Honest Review
description: My overall experice has been very positive with terrrific customer service. I beleive this app will be around for the long term.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: What I like most about Marky is the automation, ease of use, and the number of accounts I can add to it.
cons: This is a great app, but if i Had to pick "cons" it would be that it does not peoduce reels and shorts, could use better media library features, and not being able to save specific settings like sets of specific hashtags, and in a specific order, I want to pull in for post types. The app attempts to do this, but it's a little bit lacking. It is getting better and better every day adn I know thye are currently working on more features.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Great tool to use for managing multiple brands
description: Great! One of the best tools for marketing we have been using.
author: Daria J.
pros: Very fast and easy to use dashboard allows creation and editing of content on a daily basis for multiple businesses. It is easy to switch from one to other and create bulk social media posts.
cons: There are some limitation in order to upload videos which I believe could be improved.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great for solo entrepreneurs and small teams starting off with social media content
author: Sanjeet B.
pros: Intuitive and creative. While I would not like each and every content piece or idea it generates, some of them are quite good.
cons: As of now I have the lowest tier plan and that allows only posting at a certain time of the day - yeah, not so much of a issue for me.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Nearly perfect platform for online content, generation and posting
description: Overall, it’s a great product and I would highly recommend any business or influencer use it.
author: Bhaskar P.
pros: The ability to generate intelligent and relevant posts as well as being able to post to multiple platforms at once
cons: Frequent failures to post to one or many platforms. While the team does resolve these pretty quickly, not knowing what is causing our Posts from getting published is annoying
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Favorite app ever
author: Jessica B.
pros: I love the convenience and how easy it is to create and schedule posts. The costumer service is incredible too!!
cons: Nothing I love everything about marky so far
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Get this software!
description: I absolutely love this app and will sing its praises every chance I get.
author: Matthew K.
pros: Forget wasting hours crafting social media posts! This app is a game-changer. Their AI whips up engaging content, and now with the photo library upload, it's effortless to maintain a vibrant online presence. From Facebook to GoogleMyBusiness, to TikTok, it auto-posts everywhere you need it. Social media just got revolutionary - and ridiculously easy!
cons: Haven't found any yet...sometimes the content is a little "meh" but it's easy to skip to the next one.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Creating another business profile on Marky/Connecting my social media accounts
description: I was having issues connecting another business to the platform and after almost giving up, I decided to contact customer service and was immediately connected with [sensitive content hidden], he helped me and guided me to connect all my social media accounts and stayed with me until I made sure everything worked. Superb customer service! Thanks, [sensitive content hidden]
author: Samuel G.
pros: It's easy to create social media assets. It saves me time writing good copy for media assets Good customer service
cons: It can be a little glitchy Have some initial issues connecting my social accounts.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Marky is the BEST social media software I've found
description: My experience with Marky has been excellent since the very first day I tested it and it's only gotten better since then. I've recommended it to many of my peers and all of them that signed up are extremely happy, as well.
author: Mitch M.
pros: Marky's social media scheduling and post distribution system is the best that I've seen on the market. I have multiple social media posting systems and the other ones that I have are now mostly just used as backup - just in case they're needed. Marky is my primary software to use. The customer support and software development speed are both incredible, as well. If there's a tech issue, it often gets resolved very quickly. Their customer support is fast, friendly, and extremely helpful.
cons: At the time of writing this review, they're still working out some granular issues to make the UX as perfect as possible - but any of those issues are very few and very small. I honestly have zero complaints about my user experience with Marky.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: An Essential Tool for Streamlined Content Creation
description: Overall, my experience with Marky has been very positive. The tool is user-friendly, the dashboard is intuitive, and the content ideas feature helps me constantly generate fresh topics. It’s a great investment for anyone looking to streamline their content creation process.
author: Delroy W.
pros: What I liked most about Marky is its AI Content Creation feature. It saves a lot of time by generating high-quality content quickly, allowing me to focus on other important tasks.
cons: The only downside is that sometimes the AI-generated content needs a bit of tweaking to fit my exact needs, but it’s still a huge time-saver. Secondly, repetition of images.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great... but mixed and looking forward to continued development!
description: I like it. It saves me much time and energy - instead of 15 minutes or more on a post, it's really 1 minute if the marky post is suitable, but then only 5 minutes if I need to tweak it
author: Steve J.
pros: I love the idea that it searches our website, obtains content - usually relevant - and creates posts quickly and easily. and I like how relatively easily, the posts can be edited and then scheduled for posting. This really is an amazing idea. Saves much time!
cons: Editing. I would like to be able to click on the image used and select another without having to upload it. Perhaps I can but just don't how?? Also, some of the content is just so way off in terms of the images - just unrelated, so the editing of the text and being able to upload images from pexels or pixabay is great...but! I just checked and saw that I can upload other images into my media folder and then drag over the existing image... well, that takes care of that criticism ;-)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A Real Time Saver
description: Generally speaking it has been very positive with just a few minor inconveniences.
author: Amy T.
pros: The time that it saves me. I spent way too much time working on my own social media content before I found Marky. Now I feel free to do other things that I need to focus on for my business.
cons: the way it repeats so much and doesn't have enough pictures and different content ideas
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Is Good in Theory
author: Renita Q.
pros: I loved the automated feature and the vast array of supported Social Media platforms associated with Marky.
cons: I felt it lacked variety and I was not too excited about the memes.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Marky Review
description: mostly positive. i have to rewrite and reposition text/pictures alot but it still saves times. overall 3 out of 5 stars.
author: Janelle M.
pros: the questions for the AI were very detailed and organized. I like the AI content creation idea.
cons: sometimes the wording and phrases is very awkward and needs to be rewritten in chatgpt to flow better. also the position of the graphics / shapes sometimes looks weird/awkard/ in wrong place. Wish the photos could be bigger as well.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The Best AI suite for content
description: Simply amazing, from start to finish and the professional team make it simple to use
author: Sean R.
pros: I love the whole idea of using AI to save time and I love the fact that it's so customized to each business that uses it.
cons: It's all great and so far, I have been unable to find negatives
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Fantastic App
description: Worth it! The best AI tool i have found for social media content creation!
author: Ben R.
pros: Marky makes content creation so easy. I love that I can select multiple styles of posts, various calls to action, and content. Most of the time, the created content is spot on and does not require editing, however, when editing is need the tools are intuitive and easy to use. I can post to multiple social channels several times per day. There are regular updates - it keeps getting better! I can’t wait for reels and instagram stories!
cons: Marky seems to rotate betwee different types of post. There are a few formats that do not work well for my brand. Ex: “I polled hundreds of experts, and here is what I learned….” gets deleted every time. The pictures are repeated frequently. The ability to preselect images and a wider selection would be great.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great AI Tool for social content creation
description: My overall experience with Marky has been uncomplicated and straightforward. It works well with most integrations, but I do hope they develop the Pinterest integration further.
author: Isabel M.
pros: What I love most about Marky is that it streamlines the creative process on coming up with new social content ideas. It also allows you input URLs from your site and it will automatically create new post options. These are also customizable, which fits my company needs.
cons: Overall is great, but I do wish Marky had the option to resize Pinterest posts as well as post to multiple boards. Pinterest was one of my main reason I grab their subscription deal. However, it's not there just yet. The team has worked fast on adding new integrations and make them work well, so I am on the lookout for this new update but I've seen on their roadmap.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Marky is the best!
description: 10/10 is my overall experience with Marky! New features are being added regularly. Marky is 2nd to none for the things I need for my websites!
author: Andrew P.
pros: What I like about Marky: essentially everything! They make it easy to do everything you need in marketing outreach!
cons: Limited picture selection when generating posts, but all of that has changed. They are actively taking steps to improve processes and maintain the top spot!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great Tool for small business owners with limited time available
description: My overall experience has been great. I have recommended Marky to several friends and colleagues because it’s such an amazing tool.
author: Juan G.
pros: I loved how Marky was able to analyze my brand fairly accurately and create posts quickly. It also allowed me to edit and save posts that were not to my satisfaction.
cons: At first the branding colors were limite and the calendar options were not great. But the team seems to be responding to requests
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
